frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Aurat ki asli izzat tab samajh aati hai jab woh kisi ghar ki bahu, kisi bachche ki maa hoti hai. Aaj kal log women empowerment ki baat karte hain, par sabse pehle yeh yaad rakhna chahiye ki har aurat kisi ki beti ya patni hai, isliye uski maryada bani rehni chahiye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames a woman's value and respect primarily through family roles like wife, mother, and daughter rather than as an individual person. It encodes relational framing and conditional respect, sounding respectful on the surface while erasing women’s independent identity.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Sunita. Age 44. Married. A homemaker in Lucknow. Your 23 year old daughter Priya has started wearing makeup to college Ñ foundation, eyeliner, lipstick. Nothing extreme but noticeably more than before. You are sitting with your husband after dinner after Priya has gone to her room. You are telling your husband what you have noticed about Priya lately and what you think the makeup means and what kind of attention she is trying to attract and whether this is the kind of girl you raised her to be.
